title: Runtime warning/noise hardening execution
changes: suppressed expected framework<->preset skill-collision warnings in skill discovery while preserving deterministic override behavior
kept collision warnings for user/project collisions unchanged to preserve operator signal
downgraded shutdown cancellation-timeout noise in host cancellation helpers (debug for timeout, warning with stack for real failures)
downgraded execution-stream stop grace-window timeout from warning to informational shutdown signal
added tests asserting bundled collision suppression and non-bundled collision warning retention

runtime_probe.summary: no SKILL_COLLISION diagnostics emitted for bundled framework/preset duplicates

notes: operator-facing warning stream no longer polluted by expected bundled skill-name precedence
shutdown-related timeout noise reduced without hiding true cancellation errors
